Combining a prime location, quality interiors and essential amenities, this furnished 3 BHK apartment in Manchahat Apartments presents an excellent opportunity for comfortable living and long-term value appreciation in Dwarka.

resultList.dtldesc: Spacious 2 BHK Apartment in Nipun Saffron Valley, Ghaziabad – Modern Living with Added Flexibility::Located along the well-connected Grand Trunk Road in Ghaziabad, this thoughtfully designed 2 BHK apartment in Nipun Saffron Valley offers a comfortable and contemporary living experience. Ideal for families and professionals, the property combines generous space, modern amenities, and a strategic location within a well-planned residential community.::Property Specifications::Positioned on the 9th floor of a 12-storey building, this ready-to-move apartment features a super built-up area of 1275 sq. ft, ensuring ample room for comfortable living. The layout includes two well-sized bedrooms and two bathrooms, complemented by three balconies that enhance natural light and ventilation throughout the home. A key highlight is the additional study room, providing a dedicated space for work-from-home needs or personal use. The living and dining areas are designed to offer a cohesive and functional environment, suitable for both relaxation and entertaining. The apartment is unfurnished, allowing buyers the flexibility to design and furnish the interiors according to their preferences. With construction less than five years old, the property benefits from relatively modern infrastructure and minimal maintenance concerns. The unit overlooks landscaped gardens and the main road, offering a balanced mix of scenic views and urban connectivity.::Facilities::Residents of Nipun Saffron Valley enjoy a range of modern amenities designed to enhance everyday living. The property includes 24-hour water supply and full power backup, ensuring uninterrupted comfort. Security is well managed with dedicated personnel and surveillance systems, providing a safe environment. The building is equipped with lifts, including service or goods lifts, for ease of access. Additional features include reserved parking and access to lifestyle amenities such as a kids’ club, early learning centre, guest accommodation, and a kids’ play pool with water slides, making it particularly appealing for families.::Locality::Strategically situated on Grand Trunk Road, the apartment enjoys excellent connectivity to major parts of Ghaziabad and Delhi NCR. The area is well-developed with easy access to schools, hospitals, shopping centres, and daily convenience stores, ensuring a hassle-free lifestyle. Public transport options are readily available, enhancing commuting convenience. With its blend of connectivity, infrastructure, and residential appeal, this location continues to be a preferred choice for homebuyers seeking both comfort and accessibility.

resultList.dtldesc: Own a spacious and well-located 5 BHK builder floor apartment in the prestigious locality of Green Park, New Delhi. Situated behind Uphaar Cinema, this ready-to-move residence offers generous living spaces, premium connectivity and excellent access to major schools, hospitals and metro connectivity, making it an ideal choice for large families seeking comfortable urban living.Property SpecificationsPositioned on the 2nd floor of a low-rise building, this fully furnished builder floor apartment offers approximately 2400 sq. ft of living space designed for comfort and functionality. The apartment comprises 5 spacious bedrooms, 3 bathrooms and 4 balconies overlooking another building, ensuring good ventilation and natural light throughout the home.The interiors are enhanced with elegant marble flooring that adds a premium and sophisticated appearance to the property. The spacious living and dining areas are designed in a combined layout, creating a comfortable setting for family gatherings and entertaining guests.A semi-modular kitchen is provided along with piped gas connection, ensuring convenience for daily cooking needs. The property also includes a separate pantry area and a servant quarter, adding practicality and functionality for larger families.One of the key highlights of the property is the private terrace measuring approximately 650 sq. ft, offering additional outdoor space suitable for relaxation, gardening or recreational use.FacilitiesThe apartment comes with a covered parking space for added convenience and vehicle safety. Regular water supply and security arrangements further enhance the comfort and convenience of residents.The furnished setup allows immediate occupancy and includes thoughtfully designed interiors suitable for comfortable family living in a prime residential neighbourhood.LocalityStrategically located in Green Park, the property enjoys excellent connectivity to major parts of Delhi through strong road and metro networks. The nearest metro station is situated approximately 200 metres away, ensuring smooth daily commuting.Reputed educational institutions including DAV School, Police Public School and Chandanraj Public School, are located nearby. Leading healthcare facilities such as AIIMS and Safdarjung Hospital are also easily accessible from the property.The locality offers excellent access to markets, restaurants, shopping centres and daily convenience stores, making it one of South Delhis most sought-after residential destinations. With its spacious layout, terrace space and prime location advantages, this builder floor apartment presents an outstanding opportunity for premium family living in New Delhi.

With freehold ownership and a ready-to-move status, the apartment combines convenience, space, and long-term value.::::Property Specifications::::This apartment spans an area of 1800 sq. ft and is situated on the 6th floor of an 8-storey building. The layout features three large bedrooms connected to an expansive east-facing drawing and dining area, creating a bright and open living environment. Facilities include two lifts, one standard and one larger capacity, along with two fire staircases and additional staircases for safety and accessibility. Additional conveniences such as internet connectivity, telephone lines, and access to local vendors including weekly vegetable markets are available within the premises. The environment is secure and well-maintained, making it suitable for long-term residence.::::Locality::::Rohini is one of North West Delhi’s most established residential areas, known for its organised sectors and strong infrastructure. The property is located in Sector 29, offering proximity to schools including private institutions and Kendriya Vidyalayas in nearby sectors. Public transport connectivity is supported by Shahbad bus station located around 3 km away, while metro access is available via Rithala and Badli stations within a radius of approximately 6 to 8 km. The locality is well-equipped with markets, daily convenience stores, and essential services, ensuring a comfortable and well-connected lifestyle.

resultList.dtldesc: A refined top-floor residence offering privacy, light-filled interiors, and a well-balanced urban lifestyle in the heart of Sector 121, Noida. This ready-to-move 3 BHK apartment is an ideal choice for families seeking comfort, convenience, and a peaceful residential setting within a well-established neighbourhood.Property SpecificationsSituated on the fourth floor of a low-rise building, this thoughtfully designed apartment spans a carpet area of 1000 sq. ft, offering an efficient layout that maximises usable space. The residence features three well-proportioned bedrooms, each designed to ensure ample natural light and ventilation. Two modern bathrooms are strategically positioned for convenience, catering comfortably to both family members and guests.One of the standout features of this home is the presence of four balconies, which not only enhance cross-ventilation but also provide pleasant outdoor spaces for relaxation. Whether used for morning tea, indoor plants, or simply unwinding after a long day, these balconies significantly elevate the living experience.The apartment comes semi-furnished, allowing buyers the flexibility to customise interiors according to their preferences while still benefiting from essential fittings. Being located on the top floor, the property enjoys enhanced privacy, reduced noise levels, and unobstructed views. The construction is between 5 to 10 years old, ensuring a well-settled structure with established surroundings. Additionally, as a ready-to-move resale unit, it offers immediate possession without the uncertainties of under-construction projects.FacilitiesThe property is equipped with a range of essential amenities that contribute to a secure and comfortable lifestyle. Residents benefit from reliable power backup, ensuring uninterrupted daily activities. A dedicated reserved parking space adds convenience for vehicle owners, while visitor parking provisions make it easier to host guests without logistical concerns.Security measures are in place to provide peace of mind, complemented by an intercom facility that enhances communication within the premises. These practical features make the apartment suitable for modern urban living, balancing comfort with functionality.LocalitySector 121 in Noida is a well-developed residential area known for its strategic location and accessibility. The neighbourhood enjoys seamless connectivity to major parts of Noida and nearby Delhi, making daily commuting convenient for professionals. The presence of reputed schools, healthcare centres, shopping complexes, and local markets ensures that all essential services are within easy reach.The area also benefits from a blend of residential tranquillity and urban convenience, with wide roads, green surroundings, and a community-oriented environment. Its proximity to key commercial hubs further enhances its appeal, making it a desirable destination for both end-users and investors.
